title: 準1級 模擬テスト4 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: When do residents in Rome gather to enjoy the part-time jobs?
[Mock 4-1]
passage: Recently, part-time jobs has become very popular in Rome. Since 1991, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 317 more events related to part-time jobs.
explanation: pre1-04-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 準1級 模擬テスト4 読解 2
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is Miami planning to organize more events?
[Mock 4-2]
passage: Recently, science museums has become very popular in Miami. Since 1992, many residents gather on weekends. Grace, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 324 more events related to science museums.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.
Because they want to make money.
Because no one joined the events.
explanation: pre1-04-reading-02: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 準1級 模擬テスト4 英文要約 1

テーマから外れた無関係な解答
